name: Hyperwallet (PayPal) Global Payouts API
what_it_does: Hyperwallet REST API (PayPal subsidiary) for global mass payout platform. Enables AI agents to manage payee onboarding and identity verification (KYC/AML), handle mass payment disbursements to contractors, sellers, and gig workers, access multi-currency and FX conversion workflows, retrieve payment status and transaction reporting, manage payment method selection (PayPal, bank transfer, prepaid card), handle tax compliance and W-9/W-8 collection, access payee portal and self-service integration, retrieve program configuration and payout rules, manage program account and balance management, and integrate with marketplace, sharing economy, and enterprise payout systems.
use_cases: Managing global contractor and gig worker payouts from HR automation agents
Handling marketplace seller disbursements from e-commerce payment agents
Accessing payee onboarding and KYC status from compliance automation agents
Integrating global payouts with accounting from treasury automation agents
not_for: Domestic US-only payments without global cross-border payout needs
Business-to-business payments without individual contractor/seller payout focus
Consumer P2P payments without platform payout architecture
best_when: A marketplace, gig platform, or enterprise using Hyperwallet wants AI agents to automate global payee management, mass disbursements, compliance workflows, FX management, and accounting reconciliation.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Global payouts to individuals require AML, KYC, and OFAC sanctions compliance. Automated payout to unverified payees creates financial crime risk. Tax form collection (W-9/W-8) must be accurate for IRS reporting. PayPal-imposed payout restrictions may limit certain payment methods or countries without notice.

auth.notes: Hyperwallet uses username/password basic auth and REST API keys (API user credentials). Not OAuth 2.0 standard. Program-level API credentials. Developer documentation at Paylution developer portal. Webhooks for payment and payee events. PHP, Java, Python, Node.js, Ruby SDKs available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — transaction fees and program setup costs
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction-based fees; enterprise program pricing negotiated
pricing.notes: Vancouver, Canada. Subsidiary of PayPal (acquired 2018 for $400M). Founded 2000. Global mass payout platform. 2,000+ global programs. Used by Airbnb, TaskRabbit, and Upwork for contractor and seller payouts. Integrated with PayPal network for payment delivery. Competes with Payoneer and Tipalti for global payouts.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API program; batch processing preferred

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: AML/OFAC sanctions screening required before first payment to each new payee
Non-standard auth — uses username/password API credentials rather than OAuth 2.0; key rotation requires manual process
No public MCP server — REST API with Paylution developer portal
PayPal acquisition may shift product roadmap — verify Hyperwallet vs PayPal Payouts alignment for use case
Tax form collection automation (W-9/W-8) must verify EIN/SSN format and completeness for IRS reporting
Payment method availability varies by country — verify supported payout methods for each payee's location
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global payouts and payee data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, AML, OFAC. API key auth. Multi-region. Financial crime prevention and payee KYC compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global payout and payee data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, AML, OFAC. API key. Multi-region. KYC/AML and sanctions compliance.
